title: spathicalyx duckei
intro: Spathicalyx duckei, commonly known as Brazilian tree lettuce, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The health benefits of Brazilian tree lettuce include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Brazilian tree lettuce include its use as an anti-inflammatory agent and its potential to support the treatment of various diseases such as diabetes and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Brazilian tree lettuce include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and health benefits.
side_effects: Spathicalyx duckei can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's extracts or leaves can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain due to its toxic properties. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or essential oils may result in headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, while eye contact can cause irritation, redness, and temporary blindness. In severe cases, improper use of the spathicalyx duckei plant can trigger life-threatening reactions, including anaphylaxis and cardiac complications.
